title: Team & Agent Org Dashboard page
description: Dashboard page showing the org structure — C-suite agents, their domains, standing responsibilities, and current assignments. Visual team groupings.

in: New dashboard page for org structure

dod.criterion: Org page shows all C-suite agents with their domains and current assignments
Agent cards are clickable and show agent detail (personality summary, recent directives)

checklist: Navigate to org page — all 6+ agents render with correct domain labels
Click an agent card — detail panel shows personality summary and last 3 directives
